block_01: The psychology and emotional state of a trader are equally as important as any other aspect of trading, if not more. Improving your trading psychology is necessary in order to be more resilient to strong emotions that may affect your trading strategy. It also helps to prioritize rational behavior and better focus your attention.
block_02: What are the steps one needs to take in order to improve their trading psychology?
block_03: Read the article to find out how to do it and why it is crucial.
